result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 5:     AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mont...
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT rc.*
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
), agent_stats AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_stats
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT rc.*
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
), agent_stats AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_stats
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT rc.*
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
), agent_stats AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_stats
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT rc.id, rc.ownerid, rc.created_ts, rc.closed_ts
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
), agent_stats AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_stats
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), eligible_cases AS (
  SELECT rc.id, rc.ownerid, rc.created_ts, rc.closed_ts
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignments, 0) <= 1
), agent_stats AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM eligible_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_stats
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;
